new_classes.label_en: Vodka in Containers of More Than 2 Litres (CN 22086091)
new_classes.label_de: Wodka in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 22086091)
new_classes.definition_en: Vodka as described in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph (5), presented in containers of a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN code 2208 60 91 (Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The legal note references CN codes 22086011–22086099 as Vodka, referring to the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph (5). The key discriminating criterion for 22086091 within that range is the container volume exceeding 2 litres (as opposed to 22086011 which covers containers of 2 litres or less, already modelled as VodkaSmallContainer). The class and container-volume restriction capture this distinction. A small coverage gap remains because the intrinsic product characteristics of vodka (as specified in HS EN 2208(5) — e.g. organoleptic characteristics, production from agricultural ethyl alcohol) are not fully axiomatised in the current TBox; the Vodka superclass partially covers this but without explicit property restrictions on organoleptic qualities or raw-material basis.
